title: Screen Reader Form

statement.markdown:
## Overview: Create a form that is accessible to screen readers.
## Requirements
1. The form should have a descriptive label for the input field.
2. The input field should have an 'aria-label' attribute.
3. The form should have an 'aria-describedby' attribute to describe the form's purpose.
4. The form should be submitted with JavaScript to prevent the default form submission behavior.

constraints: The form should be submitted when the user presses the Enter key.
The form should have a submit button with the text 'Submit'.
The input field should have a placeholder text with the value 'Enter your name'.
